response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for a "Raden New Costume Reveal 3D Live" featuring the VTuber Raden from Hololive. It consists of a static promotional graphic with the song "God-ish" (Kamippoi na) by PinocchioP, followed by a brief transition to a 3D stage performance by the character at the very end of the clip.

scenes.description: Introductory graphic for the "Raden New Costume Reveal 3D Live" with instrumental BGM.
Promotional graphic for the "Raden New Costume Reveal 3D Live" with the song "God-ish" (Kamippoi na) playing, featuring vocals.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Spoiler warning for romance; it's heartbreak core
Spoiler warning for existence; it's wake core
Isn't that so meaningful and cool and deep?
I'm dancing dictionary core for all to see
'Scuse me
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu core
This core, that core
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu
Isn't that god core?
I'm done now, I'm done now, got it?
I'm done now, I'm done now
But even still my heart is beating loud
It's so grand, it's so grand
Tell me your dream, so grand, so grand
Make several grand, but your grace is 'til the end
Yeah, yeah!
Gott ist tot.
Isn't that god core, though? No fair!
Isn't that god core, though? (My god)
I want you, want you, iq dropping even further down
That's awful core of you, you know?
That's awful core of you! (My god)
I hate you, hate you, who's the nuisance now?
But your hair and your eyes and your mouth, and all of you
Your perfume, and your outfit, and your makeup too
It's this core, don't you know? Just look,
It's that core, don't you know?
And your quotes and all your opinions, your reviews
Your charisma, and your gags, and your senses, too
Aren't they all god core, too? No fair!
This core, that core, I'm more jealous than before!
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu core
This core, that core
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu
Isn't that god core?
Isn't the core of meta-thinking kinda harmful?
You're looking down on others, then saying you're a martyr
Staying idle in this life is only getting harder
Rotten authority snuffing out all flickers of ardor
Playing a godly role, while denying its real starter
Up on the royal throne, our leaders feel such a departure
Lessons for critics in self-restraint just makes them smarter
Do you know?
What are you on about? Shut up!
What are you on about?
I'm for real about to pass out, so
Can you get to the point?
I'm just so bored, okay? Everyone's
Just so bored, okay?
Give me something I can dance to as I beam
That's so gross, that's so gross, really
That's so gross, that's so gross
I think a fan has just converted me
It's so sad, it's so sad,
Really your mind, so sad, so sad
You're all alone 'cause you're smart, you're telling me?
So deep, so deep...
Gott ist tot.
Isn't that god core, though? No fair!
Isn't that god core, though? (My god)
Like dying, trying to convince me you're not flesh and bone
That's kind of desperate core, you know?
You're kind of desperate core (My god)
So dreadful, that you heel to epigones!
But your titles, and your art, and all your stories
And your music, and your songs and every melody
It's this core, don't you know? Just look,
It's that core, don't you know?
And your quotes and all your opinions, your reviews
Your charisma, and your gags, and your senses, too
Aren't they all god core, too? No fair!
This core, that core, I'm more jealous than before now!
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu core
This core, that core
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu core
Tuturutu tuturu
Isn't that god core?
Spoiler warning for romance; it's heartbreak core
Spoiler warning for existence; it's wake core
Soon I saw it all for what it was and I cried
I had only wished to dance without a reason why
That's life

response.thoughts:
**Analysis of the Video Clip**

Okay, so I've been tasked with breaking down this video. Let's see... First, I need to pinpoint the key scenes and identify any music, especially vocal music, along with the lyrics if they're available.

Alright, the video starts with a static image and some text, "ミラクル重大発表祭り" and "らでん新衣装お披露目3Dライブ." This initial scene from 00:00 to 04:52 uses what sounds like a high-energy BGM, presumably related to the live concert announcement. I initially thought there were no vocals, but on closer inspection and careful listening, there are vocals, starting around 00:16. The song, after a few re-listens, is definitely "God-ish" (神っぽいな) by PinocchioP. I recognize the style and vocal melody. It's the same song throughout, maybe an instrumental intro that quickly transitions. The VTuber shown is probably "儒烏風亭らでん" (Raden) from Hololive, given the text.

So, I'm identifying three scenes. First, a section that features instrumental music (00:00 - 00:16), then, a section where the song features vocals (00:16 - 04:52). Finally, the clip cuts to 3D character (Raden) on stage performing the song (04:53 - 05:04).

Now, the main goal is to find the lyrics, both in Japanese and English. I'll need to use search queries to find the official lyrics for "神っぽいな" by "ピノキオピー", and then the English translation. Since the tools are available to me, I'll leverage web search to locate those details.

The summary of the video: it features an announcement for "Raden New Costume Reveal 3D Live" from Hololive, using the song "God-ish" (Kamippoi na) by PinocchioP, sung by the VTuber Raden.



**JSON Structure Finalization**

Okay, so I've successfully identified the song as "God-ish" (神っぽいな) by PinocchioP. I have both the original Japanese lyrics and an English translation in hand. The video content breakdown is done too, and it's looking good: intro, promo graphic, and the 3D character Raden's appearance.

Now, it's all about formatting this into the final JSON structure. I need to ensure the lyrics are complete. The search results *did* provide the full lyrics, which is excellent. However, I need to be careful. The search result for the Japanese lyrics is a little messy; I need to meticulously copy and paste the text, removing any extraneous markers or translations to ensure the `reference_lyrics_og` is pristine.

The English translation from Smule is unusable because it's interspersed with the original Japanese. The Wattpad result, on the other hand, seems solid. I will use that for the `reference_lyrics_en`.

I'm double-checking everything to make certain I am not missing any details. I think I have everything. Time to populate the JSON!
